name: test_get_single_user[TC_USR_GET_004-data3]
description:
GET /users/{user_id} — parametrized across valid and invalid user IDs.
        Test cases include: existing users (200) and non-existent IDs (404).

        Test cases: TC_USR_GET_001 → TC_USR_GET_004
descriptionHtml:
GET /users/{user_id} — parametrized across valid and invalid user IDs.
    Test cases include: existing users (200) and non-existent IDs (404).

    Test cases: TC_USR_GET_001 → TC_USR_GET_004
statusMessage:
AssertionError: [TC_USR_GET_004] GET user 0 — invalid id, expect 404
    GET /users/0 → Expected 404, got 429
assert 429 == 404
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
statusTrace:

    assert response.status_code == expected_status, (

E       GET /users/0 → Expected 404, got 429
E   assert 429 == 404
E    +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
